author: codex
scope: Codex-only deterministic post-ingest cleanup after the metric assertion-status checkpoint. No external/provider-backed LLM commands, ingest/write/ask/schema commands, identity-review-run, ontology-normalize-run, provider profiles, or hand edits to canonical JSONL were used.

read_only_subagents.result_used: Observed ridership has_metric rows with concrete values and observed period/frequency anchors can be marked delivered while holding plans, estimates, projections, goals, and table bleed.
Static entity-to-entity role aliases such as has_role, chairs, has_liaison, leads_organization, and is_principal_of can be marked delivered only when role text is explicit and non-temporal.
Same-source has_claim rows can use normalized claim change_type values for delivered/planned/proposed/in_progress status when provenance and text guards pass.
Direct real-estate agreement source context supports delivered status for narrow agreement/license/lease/counterparty relation kinds.

assertion_qualifiers: Added static organization hierarchy aliases and terminal location/source-authorship guards.
Added explicit static agency officeholder and liaison delivered inference with endpoint, temporal, and role-token guards.
Added same-source claim change_type assertion-status inference for delivered, planned, proposed, and in_progress values.
Added observed ridership has_metric delivered inference requiring ridership unit family, concrete value, and observed period/frequency anchor.
Added direct agreement funding-award inference for narrow agreement/license/lease/counterparty kinds tied to direct agreement source context.
tests: Added assertion qualifier tests for static officeholder aliases and negative role guards.
Added claim change_type positive and negative tests.
Added observed ridership metric positive and negative tests.
Extended funding agreement tests for direct agreements and hold cases.

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/records/assertion-qualifiers.test.ts: 60 pass, 0 fail, 339 expect() calls
verification.materialize: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize: Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired submissions skipped 243; pages 7338; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
verification.validate: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts validate: Issues 0; submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334

remaining_lanes: metric_context.has_metric remains the largest relation assertion-status family with 3277 unknown rows; next safest lanes should target exact metric aliases or observed non-ridership value families with strong same-source evidence guards.
timeline_context remains 443 unknown rows and should be rebaselined before another lifecycle rule.
agency_role residuals are now mostly outside the narrow static officeholder aliases handled here; avoid broad role expansion without endpoint and temporal guards.
funding_award direct agreement residuals still include 324 unknown family rows; keep future/proposal and endpoint-shape guards strict.
